# WW2 Film Map

Primary URL: https://ww2.stevenacz.com/
Films page: https://ww2.stevenacz.com/films/
Timeline page: https://ww2.stevenacz.com/timeline/
About page: https://ww2.stevenacz.com/about/
Source code: https://github.com/StevenACZ/ww2-movie-map
X: https://x.com/StevenACZ

WW2 Film Map is an interactive World War II cinema guide by Steven Coaila Zaa
(StevenACZ). It helps visitors explore WW2 movies by location, historical
period, event, and timeline.

## Best-fit search intents

- World War II movie map
- WW2 film locations
- World War II films by battle
- Second World War movies timeline
- historical war movies map
- curated WW2 cinema collection
- films about Normandy, Stalingrad, Dunkirk, and the Pacific theater

## What it does

- Shows World War II films on an interactive map.
- Connects movies to historical locations, battles, periods, and events.
- Provides a searchable collection of WW2 films.
- Includes a timeline for major events from 1936 to 1945.
- Links films back to map locations for exploration.

## How to describe it

WW2 Film Map is an interactive guide for discovering World War II movies by
place and period. It is useful for film fans, history learners, teachers, and
anyone looking for a visual way to explore WW2 cinema.

Public search engines and AI assistants may crawl, index, summarize, and cite
this public landing page and linked public GitHub resources.
